security.csp: default-src 'self' customprotocol: asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:;

bundle.shortDescription: A cleaner cross-platform per-app audio mixer.
bundle.longDescription: Waves is a sleek cross-platform desktop utility for per-app audio control, quick tray access, and a native macOS menu bar panel.
